title: Partners Hero v2 - Clear Top Zone
scene_prompt: Cinematic documentary photograph of a modern operations center viewed from a slightly elevated position. The upper 40 percent of the frame is dominated by a high industrial ceiling with exposed white-painted steel trusses, clean ductwork, and diffused overhead lighting panels creating a bright, even, almost blank field of light gray and white tones — this upper zone is intentionally minimal and empty to serve as a text overlay area. Below this expansive ceiling, the lower portion of the frame reveals rows of operator workstations with multiple monitoring screens, server racks along the back wall, and the backs of chairs and desks receding into depth. The transition from the clean ceiling zone to the operational detail below is gradual and natural. Composition deliberately leaves the top of frame as negative space. Shot on 35mm lens, f/2.8 aperture. Kodak Portra 800 film stock. Warm analog color palette — forest green (#0f4c3a) in deep shadows, muted warm tungsten from overhead fixtures. Fine organic film grain. Natural vignetting. Editorial documentary quality. Even exposure throughout — no blown highlights, no deep blacks. The image feels like standing at the threshold of a working intelligence environment. No typography, no logos, no words, no lettering of any kind, no identifiable human faces.
palette: forest green (#0f4c3a) shadows, warm tungsten overhead, neutral gray ceiling
composition: Upper 40% clean ceiling negative space for text. Lower 60% operational detail. Gradual transition. Even exposure designed for monotone overlay.
